headline: Huang's Trillion-Dollar Sentence, Software's Cold Shower, and a Cyber Beat After the Bell
summary: One sentence from Jensen Huang added roughly $50 billion in market cap to a single chip stock on Tuesday. The same CEO who blessed software on Monday and watched the sector rip, kept his mouth shut on Tuesday and watched half of those names give it all back. If you wanted a clean illustration of how concentrated the influence inside this tape has become, you got it.
